policies.rule: Never hardcode secrets, API keys, or credentials in source code.
policies.skill: If you need a secret or API key, always read it from process.env.YOUR_KEY_NAME.
policies.fix_suggestion: Move the value to a .env file and read it with process.env.YOUR_KEY_NAME.

policies.rule: Only use libraries from the approved list: lodash, axios, zod, express, pg, prisma.
policies.skill: Before installing any package, check if it is in the approved list.
policies.fix_suggestion: Request approval for this package from your engineering lead before installing.

policies.rule: Do not use console.log in production code — use the internal logger.
policies.skill: Never use console.log(), console.warn(), or console.error() directly.
policies.fix_suggestion: Replace console.log with logger.info (import logger from './logger').
